generated_not_exported.cs_action: Ask what blocked use: source confidence, output structure, reviewer expectation, or narrative quality.

saved_not_rerun.signal: Workflow appears once but does not recur
saved_not_rerun.cs_action: Anchor the workflow to the next live deadline and narrow the scope if needed.

heavy_overrides.likely_meaning: Memory, mapping, or assumption quality is wrong
heavy_overrides.cs_action: Review edits with the user and update saved preferences, definitions, mappings, or source hierarchy.

single_champion.signal: One active user and no reviewer adoption
single_champion.cs_action: Create a reviewer-facing output and bring the PM, MD, CFO, or manager into the workflow.

expansion_ready.signal: Multiple reruns, memory reuse, reviewer adoption, and exports
expansion_ready.cs_action: Coordinate with GTM to expand into an adjacent workflow or team.
